mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_rad_worker WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE status WHEN '경보' THEN 0 WHEN '제한' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, register_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_rad_worker WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rad_worker WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rad_worker WHERE deleted = 0 AND worker_type = #{type}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rad_worker WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_rad_worker (employee_no, name, dept, job, worker_type, nrsc_no, dosimeter_type, dosimeter_no, register_date, last_edu_date, next_edu_date, status, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{employeeNo}, #{name}, #{dept}, #{job}, #{workerType}, #{nrscNo}, #{dosimeterType}, #{dosimeterNo}, #{registerDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{lastEduDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{nextEduDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status}'정상', 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_rad_worker SET employee_no = #{employeeNo}, name = #{name}, dept = #{dept}, job = #{job}, worker_type = #{workerType}, nrsc_no = #{nrscNo}, dosimeter_type = #{dosimeterType}, dosimeter_no = #{dosimeterNo}, register_date = #{registerDate,jdbcType=DATE}, last_edu_date = #{lastEduDate,jdbcType=DATE}, next_edu_date = #{nextEduDate,jdbcType=DATE}, status = #{status}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_rad_worker SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
